name: Htipiti Tirosalata (Mashed Cheese Salad)
recipeInstructions:
Tsouskes are hot, spicy peppers. The best ones come from Macedonia and are extremely hot and very tasty.
1. Fry the tsouskes in oil until they are crispy.
2. Peel the skin off the peppers and chop them into small pieces.
3. Cut about 1 pound of feta cheese into small pieces.
4. Mix the chopped feta with the chopped peppers in a bowl.
5. Add 3 tablespoons of olive oil to the mixture.
6. Using a fork, mash all the ingredients together until they form a paste.
7. Serve with bread or crackers as an appetizer.
From: Antonios Bouris
